authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 271910, "Kitchen Creek", Stream, CA, San Diego Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":271910,"gaz_name":"Kitchen Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"San Diego","objectid_1":2055286,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -12967456.053, 3859822.420 → 32.7322762°N, 116.4886279°W; GNIS domestic-names text file prim_lat_dec/prim_long_dec confirm the same value; source/headwater point is 32.830607°N, 116.4600168°W). Corrects prior file coordinates (-116.4918, 32.7645), which were roughly 3.6 km northeast of the actual GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate rather than a GNIS pull.

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(72) — Kitchen Creek (San Diego Co.) upstream of Lake Morena, and all its tributaries
sources.quotedText: Kitchen Creek (San Diego Co.) upstream of Lake Morena, and all its tributaries. All year. Only artificial lures may be used. 2 trout

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(a)(4) — General possession limit provision for listed trout waters
sources.quotedText: Unless otherwise provided, it is unlawful to possess more than one daily bag limit.

sources.title: Hiking San Diego County — Kitchen Creek Falls
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures may be used; no live or natural bait
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag limit; possession limit equals one daily bag limit (2) per the general provision at 14 CCR §7.50(a)(4) absent a separately stated possession limit.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag and possession limit

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
